abhijaat-vikram-singh.title: Family member
abhijaat-vikram-singh.about: Abhijaat Vikram Singh belong to the Sudha Singh branch of the tree.

abhishek-singh.title: Family couple
abhishek-singh.about: Abhishek Singh and Priyanka belong to the Sunaina Singh branch of the tree.

child.name: Aarav Singh
child.title: Family member
child.about: Son of Siddharth Singh and Pratibha. Interested in science and technology.

sri-shiv-niranjan-singh.name: Sri Shiv Niranjan Singh
sri-shiv-niranjan-singh.title: Family founders
sri-shiv-niranjan-singh.about: Sri Shiv Niranjan Singh and Dhanvantri Devi are the root of the family tree.
